'''âp-r-b''' ('''kaparab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbego|umbego]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbego|umbego]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-r-b
|-
! Lemma
| kaparab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiparab|thiparab]] || [[word:jiparab|jiparab]] || [[word:shiparab|shiparab]] || [[word:kiparab|kiparab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuparab|thuthuparab]] || [[word:jujuparab|jujuparab]] || [[word:shushuparab|shushuparab]] || [[word:kukuparab|kukuparab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuparab|thuparab]] || [[word:juparab|juparab]] || [[word:shuparab|shuparab]] || [[word:kuparab|kuparab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuparab|thuparab]] || [[word:juparab|juparab]] || [[word:shuparab|shuparab]] || [[word:kuparab|kuparab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theparab|theparab]] || [[word:jeparab|jeparab]] || [[word:sheparab|sheparab]] || [[word:keparab|keparab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoparab|thothoparab]] || [[word:jojoparab|jojoparab]] || [[word:shoshoparab|shoshoparab]] || [[word:kokoparab|kokoparab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoparab|thoparab]] || [[word:joparab|joparab]] || [[word:shoparab|shoparab]] || [[word:koparab|koparab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoparab|thoparab]] || [[word:joparab|joparab]] || [[word:shoparab|shoparab]] || [[word:koparab|koparab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠparab|thĂŠparab]] || [[word:jĂŠparab|jĂŠparab]] || [[word:shĂŠparab|shĂŠparab]] || [[word:kĂŠparab|kĂŠparab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaparab|thathaparab]] || [[word:jajaparab|jajaparab]] || [[word:shashaparab|shashaparab]] || [[word:kakaparab|kakaparab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaparab|thaparab]] || [[word:japarab|japarab]] || [[word:shaparab|shaparab]] || [[word:kaparab|kaparab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaparab|thaparab]] || [[word:japarab|japarab]] || [[word:shaparab|shaparab]] || [[word:kaparab|kaparab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaparab|shaparab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaparab|goshaparab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaparab|gokishaparab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaparabnĂŒ|shaparabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaparabnknĂŒ|goshaparabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparabnĂŒ|gokishaparabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaparabshĂ«|shaparabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaparabnkshĂ«|goshaparabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaparabshĂ«|gokishaparabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparabro|shaparabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparabnkro|goshaparabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparabro|gokishaparabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparabmu|shaparabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparabnkmu|goshaparabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparabmu|gokishaparabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaparabsher|shaparabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaparabnksher|goshaparabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaparabsher|gokishaparabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaparabng|shaparabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaparabnkng|goshaparabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaparabng|gokishaparabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaparabya|shaparabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaparabnkya|goshaparabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaparabya|gokishaparabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaparabyam|shaparabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaparabnkyam|goshaparabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaparabyam|gokishaparabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparabnĂŒshĂ«|shaparabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshaparabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishaparabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparabnĂŒro|shaparabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparabnknĂŒro|goshaparabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparabnĂŒro|gokishaparabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparabnĂŒmu|shaparabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparabnknĂŒmu|goshaparabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparabnĂŒmu|gokishaparabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparabshĂ«nĂŒ|shaparabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshaparabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishaparabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparabshĂ«ro|shaparabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparabnkshĂ«ro|goshaparabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparabshĂ«ro|gokishaparabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparabshĂ«mu|shaparabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparabnkshĂ«mu|goshaparabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparabshĂ«mu|gokishaparabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparabronĂŒ|shaparabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparabnkronĂŒ|goshaparabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparabronĂŒ|gokishaparabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparabroshĂ«|shaparabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparabnkroshĂ«|goshaparabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparabroshĂ«|gokishaparabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaparabromu|shaparabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaparabnkromu|goshaparabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaparabromu|gokishaparabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaparabmunĂŒ|shaparabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaparabnkmunĂŒ|goshaparabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaparabmunĂŒ|gokishaparabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaparabmushĂ«|shaparabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaparabnkmushĂ«|goshaparabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaparabmushĂ«|gokishaparabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaparabmuro|shaparabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaparabnkmuro|goshaparabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaparabmuro|gokishaparabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
